# Accessor: framebuffer

## Get Signature

```ts
get framebuffer(): TextmodeFramebuffer;
```

Normalized glyph atlas framebuffer used by the ASCII shader.

### Returns

[`TextmodeFramebuffer`](../../../../../classes/TextmodeFramebuffer.md)
